title: Career Opportunity Teacher at SSC Tube

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at SSC Tube
jsonLd.description:
SSC Tube invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SSC Tube:
SSC Tube is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SSC Tube!
